heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/88/Mercedes-AMG_R190_GT_R_Roadster_Speedlegend_IAA_2021_1X7A0124.jpg/1920px-Mercedes-AMG R190 GT R Roadster Speedlegend IAA 2021 1X7A0124.jpg
description: The Mercedes-AMG GT, produced from 2014, is AMG's front-mid-engined sports car. Its hand-built 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 produces 462-730 bhp depending on variant. The track-focused GT R with its rear-wheel steering and the limited-edition GT Black Series with 730 bhp are the most collectible.
